chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 593 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 2728/25 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 13.05.2025. Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG. *********** Mr. Sher Muahmmad Ujjan Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5, taken on record. Statements have been filed on behalf of Respondents Nos. 2 to 4, taken on record. ASI Abid Ali Buller Investigating Officer of crime No.35/2025 of Police Station Bhirya city present and submits that now the FIR subject matter of this petition has been challaned. After such statement counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition and submits that he will approach trial Court and will file appropriate application for pre-mature acquittal, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
